mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.ap_file (node_id, saved_path, original_name, file_size, content_type, sha256_hash, width, height, thumbnail_path) VALUES ( CAST(#{nodeId} AS UUID), #{savedPath}, #{originalName}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, #{sha256Hash}, #{width}, #{height}, #{thumbnailPath} )
mapper.select: SELECT node_id, saved_path, original_name, file_size, content_type, sha256_hash, width, height, thumbnail_path, upload_dt FROM cms.ap_file WHERE node_id = CAST(#{nodeId} AS UUID)
